personal.name: Subodh Adhikari
personal.title: Full-Stack Web Developer & DevOps
personal.tagline: I build, containerize, and deploy complete web applications — Spring Boot backends, Angular frontends, Dockerized, shipped via CI/CD to production.

about: I deliver complete, production-ready web applications — from secured backend APIs to containerized deployments on live servers. My work includes a system delivered for the Department of IT, Government of Sikkim, and CampusConnect, a fully deployed role-based academic platform with 194 automated tests and a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline. I focus on writing maintainable code and understanding system behavior beyond surface-level implementation.

featuredProjects.customDescription: Delivered for the Department of IT, Government of Sikkim. Digitized the state government's internship process — replacing paper workflows with role-based automation covering applications, document management, progress tracking, and certificate issuance.
featuredProjects.liveLabel: Production system — public demo not available

featuredProjects.customDescription: Role-based collaborative learning platform for Admin, HOD, Teacher, and Student roles. Containerized with Docker, deployed via GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline to GHCR and Railway. Includes 194 automated tests across controller, service, and repository layers.
featuredProjects.highlight: 194 Tests · Docker + CI/CD · Live on Railway
